draft.conclusion: I found the main concern but have not completed the evidence, impact, fix, or test analysis.

findings.problem: Confirm ClosedPoolError is not caught by any existing except in send (not a subclass of ProtocolError/OSError/MaxRetryError/_ProxyError/_SSLError/ReadTimeoutError), so it really did leak. closedpoolerror 穿透 closedpoolerror 泄漏 子类 not subclass not caught 继承
